{{Quote|In my experience, there's always reason to be suspicious.|SD-XX|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Tempest">''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''</ref>}}
'''SD-XX''', or '''Double-Ex''', was a [[Class four droid/Legends|fourth-degree]] [[SD-X-series stealth battle droid|SD-X-series]]<ref name="SGD" /> personal [[Security droid/Legends|security droid]] built by [[Tendrando Arms]]. [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] had him onboard his [[Anakin Solo (starship)|personal]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].

SD-XX had thin armor and blue [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]] set in a black skull-like face and resembled a scaled-down version of the [[YVH 1]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]]. He had a raspy, threatening voice.

When Jacen began sensing [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] presences onboard the ''Anakin Solo'', he immediately called out SD-XX. After [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] had confronted Jacen and mysteriously disappeared, Jacen questioned if he had really been there. When he asked SD-XX about it, SD-XX said that Luke had never been there or had a conversation with Jacen. Later, after Luke confronted Jacen about sending his [[Ben Skywalker|son]] to assassinate [[Cal Omas]] and left he appeared behind Jacen and stated that he was relieved he didn't have to kill him too. To Jacen's astonishment, he managed to make Jacen confess about killing [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] after telling him he was letting secrets slip in his sleep. Another secret was his talk about necessary sacrifices and making the galaxy safe for children like his daughter, Allana. Jacen lost his temper, warned him about being converted into torpedo parts, and then sent him to return to his monitoring duties.

He was later tasked with the torture of Ben Skywalker to extract the location of the Jedi base for Jacen, now Darth Caedus. The attempts failed, and after Ben escaped, SD-XX tracked him to the [[Carida system/Legends|Carida Nebula]], where he attacked his ship. Ben was able to Force push SD-XX out an air lock, and sent him spiraling into space, where he was left drifting.
